# AI in the Terminal

<!-- STUB (Phase 0). Scope: PLAN.md Section 8, Ch 16. EXEMPLAR (Phase 2,
     G2 style). Claude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI; principles-first,
     version-stamped. Durable spine: permission models, destructive-
     command boundaries, file/scope boundaries, network access, secrets
     in prompts, review discipline; what an agent must NEVER run
     unsupervised; reproducibility implications. -->
